resources.string: Shows that safety monitoring is active. This notice is always visible.
Your parent set up safety monitoring on this phone.

This phone is set up with Family Guardian so your parent can help keep you safe. It shares your location, which apps you use and for how long, and lets your parent set screen-time and bedtime. You can always see it is running from this icon and the notification. This is on purpose — nothing here is hidden.
Ask your parent to open their dashboard and show the pairing QR code, then scan it.
Point the camera at the QR code shown on your parent\'s dashboard.
Pairing failed. Ask your parent for a fresh code.
Camera access is needed to scan the pairing code.
This phone is linked to your family. Finish granting the permissions below so everything works.
Stop battery from killing the app
If you think this is a mistake, talk to your parent.
It\'s bedtime. The phone is resting until morning.
This app is not available right now.
Lets your parent set app limits, bedtime, and safe zones, and keeps the app from being removed.
